verses.text: حمٓ
verses.translation: Ha, Meem
verses.translation_pt: Ha, Mim.

verses.text: وَٱلۡكِتَٰبِ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
verses.translation: By the clear Book
verses.translation_pt: Pelo livro claro e direto.

verses.text: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ فِي لَيۡلَةٖ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
verses.translation: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind]
verses.translation_pt: Na verdade, nós o revelamos numa noite abençoada. Nós sempre avisamos.

verses.text: فِيهَا يُفۡرَقُ كُلُّ أَمۡرٍ حَكِيمٍ
verses.translation: On that night is made distinct every precise matter
verses.translation_pt: Naquele dia, tudo será decidido com sabedoria.

verses.text: أَمۡرٗا مِّنۡ عِندِنَآۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرۡسِلِينَ
verses.translation: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]
verses.translation_pt: Uma ordem vinda de Deus. Nós sempre enviamos mensageiros.

verses.text: رَحۡمَةٗ مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.translation: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing
verses.translation_pt:
Uma misericórdia de Deus para você.
Deus ouve e sabe tudo.

verses.text: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَآۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain
verses.translation_pt: Senhor dos céus, da terra e de tudo entre eles. Se vocês duvidam.

verses.text: لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحۡيِۦ وَيُمِيتُۖ رَبُّكُمۡ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translation: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers
verses.translation_pt: Não há outro deus além dele. Ele dá a vida e a morte. Ele é o seu Deus e o Deus dos seus antepassados.

verses.text: بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ يَلۡعَبُونَ
verses.translation: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves
verses.translation_pt: Mas duvidam e só brincam.

verses.text: فَٱرۡتَقِبۡ يَوۡمَ تَأۡتِي ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.translation: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke
verses.translation_pt: Espere o dia em que o céu trouxer uma fumaça densa.

verses.text: يَغۡشَى ٱلنَّاسَۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
verses.translation: Covering the people; this is a painful torment
verses.translation_pt: Isso cobre o povo. Que terrível sofrimento!

verses.text: رَّبَّنَا ٱكۡشِفۡ عَنَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.translation: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers
verses.translation_pt:
Senhor, afasta o castigo de nós.
Acreditamos em ti.

verses.text: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ وَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ رَسُولٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.translation: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger
verses.translation_pt: Como podem lembrar, se um mensageiro claro lhes chegou?

verses.text: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوۡاْ عَنۡهُ وَقَالُواْ مُعَلَّمٞ مَّجۡنُونٌ
verses.translation: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman
verses.translation_pt: Então se afastaram e disseram: "Ele é um louco ensinado."

verses.text: إِنَّا كَاشِفُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابِ قَلِيلًاۚ إِنَّكُمۡ عَآئِدُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief]
verses.translation_pt:
Vamos tirar este castigo por um tempo.
Vocês voltarão a ser como antes.

verses.text: يَوۡمَ نَبۡطِشُ ٱلۡبَطۡشَةَ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
verses.translation: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution
verses.translation_pt: No dia da grande punição, certamente nos vingaremos.

verses.text: ۞وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَجَآءَهُمۡ رَسُولٞ كَرِيمٌ
verses.translation: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger
verses.translation_pt:
Já provamos o povo do Faraó antes.
Um mensageiro nobre foi a eles.

verses.text: أَنۡ أَدُّوٓاْ إِلَيَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.translation: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.translation_pt:
Entreguem a mim os servos de Deus.
Sou um mensageiro confiável.

verses.text: وَأَن لَّا تَعۡلُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّيٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.translation: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority
verses.translation_pt: Não se exaltem contra Deus. Eu trago prova clara.

verses.text: وَإِنِّي عُذۡتُ بِرَبِّي وَرَبِّكُمۡ أَن تَرۡجُمُونِ
verses.translation: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me
verses.translation_pt: Busco refúgio no meu Deus e no de vocês, para que não me apedrejem.

verses.text: وَإِن لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُواْ لِي فَٱعۡتَزِلُونِ
verses.translation: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone
verses.translation_pt: Se não creem em mim, deixem-me em paz.

verses.text: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوۡمٞ مُّجۡرِمُونَ
verses.translation: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people
verses.translation_pt: Então ele pediu a Deus: "Este povo é criminoso."

verses.text: فَأَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِي لَيۡلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.translation: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued
verses.translation_pt:
Saiam com meus servos à noite.
Eles serão perseguidos.

verses.text: وَٱتۡرُكِ ٱلۡبَحۡرَ رَهۡوًاۖ إِنَّهُمۡ جُندٞ مُّغۡرَقُونَ
verses.translation: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned
verses.translation_pt: Deixe o mar em paz. Eles serão afogados.

verses.text: كَمۡ تَرَكُواْ مِن جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٖ
verses.translation: How much they left behind of gardens and springs
verses.translation_pt: Quantos jardins e fontes eles deixaram para trás.

verses.text: وَزُرُوعٖ وَمَقَامٖ كَرِيمٖ
verses.translation: And crops and noble sites
verses.translation_pt: E plantações e um lugar honroso.

verses.text: وَنَعۡمَةٖ كَانُواْ فِيهَا فَٰكِهِينَ
verses.translation: And comfort wherein they were amused
verses.translation_pt: E um conforto que os alegrava muito.

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَۖ وَأَوۡرَثۡنَٰهَا قَوۡمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
verses.translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people
verses.translation_pt: Assim foi. E demos essa terra a outro povo.

verses.text: فَمَا بَكَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنظَرِينَ
verses.translation: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved
verses.translation_pt:
Nem o céu nem a terra choraram por eles.
Não lhes foi dado mais tempo.

verses.text: وَلَقَدۡ نَجَّيۡنَا بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡمُهِينِ
verses.translation: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment
verses.translation_pt: Livramos os israelitas do sofrimento humilhante.

verses.text: مِن فِرۡعَوۡنَۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.translation: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors
verses.translation_pt: Do Faraó, pois ele era orgulhoso e injusto.

verses.text: وَلَقَدِ ٱخۡتَرۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ عِلۡمٍ عَلَى ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translation: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds
verses.translation_pt: Nós os escolhemos com conhecimento sobre o mundo.

verses.text: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٞاْ مُّبِينٌ
verses.translation: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial
verses.translation_pt: Demos a eles sinais que mostravam a verdade.

verses.text: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying
verses.translation_pt: Eles estão realmente dizendo isso.

verses.text: إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّا مَوۡتَتُنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
verses.translation: There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected
verses.translation_pt: É só a nossa primeira morte e não voltaremos.

verses.text: فَأۡتُواْ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.translation: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful
verses.translation_pt: Tragam nossos pais, se vocês forem sinceros.

verses.text: أَهُمۡ خَيۡرٌ أَمۡ قَوۡمُ تُبَّعٖ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ مُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.translation: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals
verses.translation_pt: Serão piores ou o povo de Tubá e quem viveu antes? Nós os destruímos, pois eram pecadores.

verses.text: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
verses.translation: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play
verses.translation_pt: Deus criou os céus e a terra com um propósito.

verses.text: مَا خَلَقۡنَٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.translation: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know
verses.translation_pt: Criamos tudo com um propósito, mas poucos o entendem.

verses.text: إِنَّ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ مِيقَٰتُهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all
verses.translation_pt: O Dia do Juízo é o tempo marcado para todos.

verses.text: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي مَوۡلًى عَن مَّوۡلٗى شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.translation: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped
verses.translation_pt:
No dia, ninguém ajudará outro.
Ninguém será salvo nesse dia.

verses.text: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.translation: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.translation_pt:
Só a quem Deus tiver compaixão.
Deus é Poderoso, Misericordioso.

verses.text: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.translation: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum
verses.translation_pt: A árvore do zaquum, sim.

verses.text: طَعَامُ ٱلۡأَثِيمِ
verses.translation: Is food for the sinful
verses.translation_pt: Comida para quem faz o mal.

verses.text: كَٱلۡمُهۡلِ يَغۡلِي فِي ٱلۡبُطُونِ
verses.translation: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies
verses.translation_pt: Como óleo fervendo, queima por dentro.

verses.text: كَغَلۡيِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ
verses.translation: Like the boiling of scalding water
verses.translation_pt: Como água fervendo em fogo forte.

verses.text: خُذُوهُ فَٱعۡتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire
verses.translation_pt: Peguem-no e joguem no fogo do inferno.

verses.text: ثُمَّ صُبُّواْ فَوۡقَ رَأۡسِهِۦ مِنۡ عَذَابِ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ
verses.translation: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water
verses.translation_pt: Então derramem água fervente sobre sua cabeça.

verses.text: ذُقۡ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡكَرِيمُ
verses.translation: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble
verses.translation_pt: Prove! Você é o poderoso, o generoso.

verses.text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمۡتَرُونَ
verses.translation: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute
verses.translation_pt: Isto é o que vocês duvidavam.

verses.text: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي مَقَامٍ أَمِينٖ
verses.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place
verses.translation_pt: Os justos estarão em segurança.

verses.text: فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٖ
verses.translation: Within gardens and springs
verses.translation_pt: Em jardins e fontes de água.

verses.text: يَلۡبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٖ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.translation: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other
verses.translation_pt: Vestem seda e brocado, sentados frente a frente.

verses.text: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجۡنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٖ
verses.translation: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes
verses.translation_pt: Assim os unimos a belas mulheres de olhos grandes.

verses.text: يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.translation: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure
verses.translation_pt: Lá eles pedirão toda fruta, seguros e tranquilos.

verses.text: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلۡمَوۡتَ إِلَّا ٱلۡمَوۡتَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.translation: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
verses.translation_pt: Ali não provarão a morte, só a primeira. Deus os livra do fogo.

verses.text: فَضۡلٗا مِّن رَّبِّكَۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
verses.translation: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment
verses.translation_pt:
Uma graça do seu Deus.
Essa é a grande vitória.

verses.text: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translation: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded
verses.translation_pt: Nós o tornamos fácil em sua língua, para que se lembrem.

verses.text: فَٱرۡتَقِبۡ إِنَّهُم مُّرۡتَقِبُونَ
verses.translation: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end]
verses.translation_pt: Espere, pois eles também estão à espera.
